purpose: Turn Phase3CN arm/family feedback into explicit Phase3CP search budgets before any medium search restart.

phase3co-multi-arm-scheduler-smoke.role: read Phase3CN feedback tables and write arm budget plus family action tables

hard_rules: no true1min portfolio evaluation inside scheduler
holdout is not used for scheduler scoring
CEM exploit is capped when Phase3CN feedback_update_allowed=false
fresh arms keep a budget floor
blocked/frozen families get zero followup budget cap
exploit_allowed families get bounded followup budget cap
exit_gate_for_phase3co: allocated budget equals requested total budget
fresh share is at least fresh_floor_share
CEM budget respects cem_probe_cap_share when feedback is guarded
blocked/frozen family action exists with cap zero
exploit_allowed family action exists with positive cap
